comments: Approved. The ratification packet explicitly identifies the governance breach as the unauthorized execution of M6-B, M6-C, and the V0.7 retrospective after the bounded M6-A circuit-breaker recovery. It clearly scopes the unauthorized execution window, enumerates the affected artifacts produced during that window, confirms that the L2/L3 Physical Gating Protocol remained intact with no self-approval or source-code contamination, and presents explicit remediation choices: Option A (Formal Ratification) and Option B (Hard Rollback to commit a23ca48). Repository status verification at review time showed no staged or unstaged implementation-file modifications; only this decision artifact is being added.
